sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59665" key="krasth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραστήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n59665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rack, manger</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.142</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.166</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n59665.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> in pl., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bed-posts</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">155</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
